Petition Of Lucy Kirksey And Erma J Powell For Order Instructing Trustee To Return Preliminary Distribution To Trust And For Enhanced Monetary Damages
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Continued To Mar-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Winslow for James Clark (Respondent).

Mr. Winslow stated that he has not heard from Mr. Morris, requested that the petition be dismissed and stated that the trial date on the civil matter was set for February 28, 2011. The matter was continued to March 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk will notify Mr. Morris of the new hearing date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition Of Lucy Kirksey And Erma J Powell For Order Instructing Trustee To Return Preliminary Distribution To Trust And For Enhanced Monetary Damages
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Continued To Jan-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Morris for Lucy Kirksey and Erma Powell (Petitioners). Edward Winlsow for James Clark (Respondent).

Judge Wiss disclosed that she has known Paul Perdue for a number of years in a professional capacity. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Trustee transferring funds to himself while the civil action is still pending. The Court suggested that the procedural defect in the petition be corrected, that the Parties work out a stipulation with regard to the other 50% of the corpus of the Trust pending the civil action, and continued the matter to January 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of an amended petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.
